scripts.test: bun run test:sdk-ts && bun run test:sdk-py
scripts.data:check-new-models:test: cd scripts/model-discovery && bunx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.validate:docs: bun run docs:links && bun run docs:build
scripts.validate:web: bun run web:lint && bun run web:build
scripts.validate:api: bun run api:lint && bun run api:build
scripts.validate:packages: bun run packages:build:ts && bun run packages:pack:ts && bun run packages:build:py
scripts.openapi:gen:ts: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/ts.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen && tsx scripts/postprocess-ts-sdk.ts && rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/docs packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/.openapi-generator packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/.openapi-generator-ignore
scripts.openapi:gen:py: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/py.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen && rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/docs packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.openapi-generator packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.openapi-generator-ignore packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/README.md packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/requirements.txt packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/setup.py packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/setup.cfg packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/tox.ini packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/test-requirements.txt packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.github packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/test packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.gitignore packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.gitlab-ci.yml packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.travis.yml packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/git_push.sh packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/pyproject.toml
scripts.openapi:gen:go: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-go/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/go.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-go/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:csharp: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-csharp/src/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/csharp.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-csharp/src/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:php: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-php/src/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/php.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-php/src/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:ruby: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ruby/lib/gen && bunx openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/ruby.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-ruby/lib/gen
scripts.openapi:gen: bun run openapi:gen:ts && bun run openapi:gen:py && bun run openapi:gen:go && bun run openapi:gen:csharp && bun run openapi:gen:php && bun run openapi:gen:ruby
scripts.changeset:version: bunx changeset version && bun run sdk-py:sync-version
scripts.precommit: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run validate:data && bun run validate:pricing && bun run validate:gateway && bun run openapi:lint && bun run validate:docs && bun run validate:web && bun run validate:api && bun run validate:packages && (cd apps/web && bun run test) && bun run test
